s_eu_p: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. You can find our e-mail address in the legal notice above.
s_disclaimer_p1: All content that we use for our website is created and selected with the utmost care. However, we cannot accept any liability for the accuracy, completeness and topicality of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with §7 paragraph 1 TMG (German Telemedia Act) and general laws. According to §8 to §10 TMG, however, we are not obliged as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity. Obligations to remove or block the use of information in accordance with general legislation remain unaffected by this.
s_disclaimer_p2: However, liability in this respect is only possible from the point in time at which we become aware of a specific legal infringement. As soon as we become aware of such an infringement, we will remove this content immediately.
s_connected_p1: This Legal Notice also applies to the social media pages, accounts and websites:
s_connected_li: https://www.instagram.com/ProjektCity and the associated account https://threads.net/@ProjektCity
s_connected_p2: All agreements, guidelines, terms and policies contained in the links on the aforementioned website that refer to this page are directly related to Projekt City and therefore come into force.
s_connected_p3: All other sites not mentioned here which nevertheless refer to these agreements, guidelines, terms and policies are not associated with Projekt City and Projekt City Ltd. accepts no liability for actions taken on behalf of these sites under Projekt City. Accordingly, these agreements, guidelines, terms and policies do not apply to these sites.
s_legal_p1: The use of our services is also subject to other conditions. For a better understanding of how we collect, use and analyze your data, which conditions apply to the use of our services and how you may use our world, please also read these.
s_legal_p2: For more information, read the End-User Licence Agreement, GitHub Privacy, Privacy Policy, Terms of Use and Use Our World Policy.
